task_description: Build V1.0 of the Kepa Metales Preciosos multi-page professional website. Transform the current single-page landing into a complete 8-page site with: Homepage, Sobre Kepa, Metales Preciosos (educational), Como Funciona, Partners/Auvesta, Blog/Guias, Contacto, and Aviso Legal. Pure HTML/CSS/JS, premium black/gold design, responsive, professional, trust-building, educational content with no financial advice claims.

verification.summary: Static site - no build/test step. All 8 HTML pages verified: consistent navigation (7 links per page), correct WhatsApp number (34611918310), full footer with organized links on all pages. CSS valid with 1412 lines covering all components. JS handles navbar, mobile menu, reveal animations, FAQ accordion, form validation, active nav per page.
